system.description: When you **_wish to use an arcanum's move or option without having unlocked it_**, ask the GM what fool risk(s) it requires and/or what consequence(s) you'll incur. If you go for it, roll +INT: **_on a 7+_**, you get it to work this once; **on a 10+**, also mark one step towards unlocking the arcanum's mysteries.

success.value: It works and you mark one step towards unlocking the arcanum's mysteries.
